name: happycodex
description: Thin reliability workflow for complex Codex work with durable acceptance evidence and fresh native review.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable native workflow for complex implementation
interface.longDescription: Complete complex Codex implementation tasks with one Root writer, an immutable task baseline, durable acceptance evidence, optional bounded investigation, evidence-driven implementation, and fresh native review.
defaultPrompt: Use $happycodex to complete this cross-cutting implementation with durable acceptance evidence and fresh native review.
Use $happycodex with Goal to carry this multi-phase refactor across compaction with acceptance evidence and native review.
